LanguageData.Ammo_2Bore_FMJ.label: 2-Bore (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_2Bore_FMJ.description: An extremely large caliber sporting cartridge, almost impractical for any purpose, but capable of bringing down large targets like elephants or rhinoceroses.
LanguageData.Ammo_2Bore_AP.label: 2-Bore (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_2Bore_AP.description: An extremely large caliber sporting cartridge, almost impractical for any purpose, but capable of bringing down large targets like elephants or rhinoceroses.
LanguageData.Ammo_2Bore_Incendiary.label: 2-Bore (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_2Bore_Incendiary.description: An extremely large caliber sporting cartridge, almost impractical for any purpose, but capable of bringing down large targets like elephants or rhinoceroses.
LanguageData.Ammo_2Bore_HE.label: 2-Bore (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_2Bore_HE.description: An extremely large caliber sporting cartridge, almost impractical for any purpose, but capable of bringing down large targets like elephants or rhinoceroses.
LanguageData.Ammo_2Bore_Sabot.label: 2-Bore (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_2Bore_Sabot.description: An extremely large caliber sporting cartridge, almost impractical for any purpose, but capable of bringing down large targets like elephants or rhinoceroses.
LanguageData.Bullet_2Bore_FMJ.label: 2-Bore bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_2Bore_AP.label: 2-Bore bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_2Bore_Incendiary.label: 2-Bore bullet (AP-I)
LanguageData.Bullet_2Bore_HE.label: 2-Bore bullet (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Bullet_2Bore_Sabot.label: 2-Bore bullet (Sabot)
